terms.description: Baseline receptor turnover independent of drug MoA.

terms.expression_text: k_ub * CBL_active * pEGFR * (1 + alpha_e_cbl_ubiquitinates_egfr * Drug / (KD_e_cbl_ubiquitinates_egfr + Drug))
- k_cbl_deg * EGFR_ubiquitinated * EGFR_total * (1 + alpha_e_ubiquitinated_egfr_degrades_total * Drug / (KD_e_ubiquitinated_egfr_degrades_total + Drug))

state_equations.expression_text: k_syn_EGFR - k_deg_base * EGFR_total - k_cbl_deg * EGFR_ubiquitinated * EGFR_total * (1 + alpha_e_ubiquitinated_egfr_degrades_total * Drug / (KD_e_ubiquitinated_egfr_degrades_total + Drug))
- k_erk_off * pERK + k_erk_on * RAS_GTP / (K_RAS + RAS_GTP) * pEGFR / (K_pEGFR + pEGFR)
- k_pheno_turnover * Phenotype + k_pheno_turnover * w_erk * pERK / (K_pheno + pERK) + k_pheno_turnover * w_akt * pAKT / (K_pheno + pAKT)
- k_ub_clear * EGFR_ubiquitinated + k_ub * CBL_active * pEGFR * (1 + alpha_e_cbl_ubiquitinates_egfr * Drug / (KD_e_cbl_ubiquitinates_egfr + Drug))
